title: glyceria insularis
intro: Glyceria insularis, also known as the island mannagrass or island glyceria, is a type of perennial grass native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Glyceria insularis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Glyceria insularis can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
